fix.item: Fixed Legacy Archive Directory custom path handling when changed from default values
Fixed Active Gallery Directory custom path handling when changed from default values
Fixed dashboard directory cards showing incorrect default paths after configuration changes
Fixed Legacy Index rebuild ignoring custom Legacy Archive Directory settings
Fixed Active Index rebuild ignoring custom Active Gallery Directory settings
Fixed legacy indexing conflicts when Legacy Archive Directory includes the Active Gallery Directory

change.item: Improved path normalization and component parameter loading consistency
Improved migration safety when legacy galleries are indexed from broader directories
Improved dashboard accuracy for custom gallery path deployments
Improved Joomla Update metadata consistency for production releases

note.item: This release focuses on custom path handling, indexing reliability and migration safety
Recommended update for all users of version 1.0.0, 1.0.1, 1.0.2 and 1.0.3

addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Image Gallery component with modern MVC architecture
Added active managed gallery system
Added legacy gallery indexing with read-only compatibility support
Added portable path-based shortcode support for legacy and active galleries
Added frontend gallery display module
Added content plugin for article gallery rendering
Added editor button for easy gallery shortcode insertion
Added popup image viewer support
Added responsive frontend gallery layouts
Added Normal Grid and Masonry frontend display modes
Added gallery management interface
Added Manage Photos interface with pagination
Added Scan Existing Photos support
Added automatic image indexing system
Added support for JPG, PNG and WEBP image uploads
Added automatic image optimization workflow
Added strict filename sanitization policy
Added optional watermark support per gallery
Added Joomla menu item integration for direct gallery frontend pages
Added Joomla ACL permissions support
Added Keep Data on Uninstall option
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: Gallery architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Legacy gallery compatibility implemented without modifying historical gallery folders
Frontend rendering kept lightweight to minimize template conflicts
CSS and JavaScript namespaced for safer third-party compatibility
Manage Photos optimized with pagination for larger galleries
Gallery indexing optimized for controlled batch operations
Modern service provider and MVCComponent architecture used throughout

security.item: Added SQL injection protection using Joomla database APIs and parameterized queries
Added XSS protection through proper output escaping
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added path traversal protection for filesystem operations
Added strict filename validation for safer uploads
Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations

note.item: Initial public release of DevArt Image Gallery for Joomla 6
Designed for editorial, news and high-traffic Joomla websites
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
